uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The specimen independently states underlying chemistry facts and does not copy or adapt the source's prose, examples, questions, organization, or media.

agentAccess.notes: The current source page prohibits ingestion into generative-AI offerings. Contributor agents must not open or process its substantive content; a human rights and academic reviewer must verify any retained citation.

sources.title: Compendium of Chemical Terminology (the Gold Book)

sources.license: CC BY-SA 4.0 for individual terms (goldbook.iupac.org, retrieved 2026-07-19). ShareAlike is incompatible with a CC BY 4.0 corpus: cite the term DOI, do not copy definition text.

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: The specimen uses independently written terminology explanations and does not reproduce or adapt the source's definition text, selection, or presentation.

agentAccess.notes: Agent-ingestion permission was not established for this specimen, so contributor agents must treat the source as human-verification only.
